case_title: ROSE, LAVERNE vs. STOFF, ALLEN D et al

docket_entries.description: PERSONAL INJURY/PROPERTY DAMAGE - NON-VEHICLE RELATED, COMPLAINT FILED BY PLAINTIFF ROSE, LAVERNE AS TO DEFENDANT STOFF, ALLEN D STOFF, BARBARA DOES 1 THROUGH 10, INCLUSIVE SUMMONS ISSUED STATUS CONFERENCE SCHEDULED FOR          SEP-09-1993 PROOF OF SERVICE DUE ON                  JUL-12-1993 STATUS CONFERENCE STATEMENT DUE ON       AUG-20-1993
STATUS CONFERENCE CALENDAR OF SEP-09-1993, CONTINUED TO NOV-08-1993 AT 02:00 PM IN DEPT 04 FURTHER STATUS. NOTICE SENT BY COURT

STATUS CONFERENCE CALENDAR OF NOV-08-1993, ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE FOR FAILURE TO APPEAR AT STATUS CONFERENCE ON NOV-08-1993, TO SERVE DEFENDANT AND FILE PROOF OF SERVICE WITHIN 60 DAYS OF FILING OF COMPLAINT, TO FILE A STATUS CONFERENCE STATEMENT WITHIN 20 CALENDAR DAYS OF STATUS CONFERENCE DATE (LOCAL RULE 303E4) HEARING SET FOR DEC-08-1993 AT 02:00 PM IN DEPT 04 NOTICE SENT BY COURT
OSC CALENDAR OF DEC-08-1993, CONTINUED TO FEB-08-1994 AT 02:00 PM IN DEPT 04 FOR STATUS CONFERENCE. NOTICE SENT BY COURT
STATUS CONFERENCE CALENDAR OF FEB-08-1994, CONTINUED TO APR-07-1994 AT 02:00 PM IN DEPT 04 PLAINTIFF TO GIVE NOTICE. NOTICE SENT BY COURT
STATUS CONFERENCE CALENDAR OF APR-07-1994, CONTINUED TO JUN-06-1994 AT 02:00 PM IN DEPT 04 PLAINTIFF SHALL GIVE NOTICE. NOTICE SENT BY COURT
DISMISSAL OF ENTIRE ACTION OF ALL PARTIES AND ALL CAUSES OF ACTION WITH PREJUDICE
STATUS CONFERENCE CALENDAR OF JUN-06-1994, OFF CALENDAR
